title: Guidance for empirical research to inform the design of the MICS toolbox and platform
author: Sasha Woods
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document contains detailed interview guidance for obtaining empirical inputs from existing Citizen Science projects as part of the efforts to develop the MICS toolbox
